file.content:
name: JavaCI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
  pull_request:

jobs:
  ubuntu_build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        java: [8, 11, 17, 21, 25]
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Setup java
        uses: actions/setup-java@v3
        with:
          java-version: ${{ matrix.java }}
          distribution: "zulu"
          cache: "maven"
      - name: Build with Maven
        run: mvn -V -ntp clean install -P full verify

  windows_build:
    runs-on: windows-2022
    strategy:
      matrix:
        java: [8, 11]
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Setup java
        uses: actions/setup-java@v3
        with:
          java-version: ${{ matrix.java }}
          distribution: "zulu"
          cache: "maven"
      - name: Build with Maven
        run: mvn -V -ntp clean install -P full

  macos_build:
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    strategy:
      matrix:
        java: [8, 11]
        os:
          - macos-latest
          - macos-14
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Setup java
        uses: actions/setup-java@v3
        with:
          java-version: ${{ matrix.java }}
          distribution: "zulu"
          cache: "maven"
      - name: Build with Maven
        run: mvn -V -ntp clean install -P full

  telnet_stop_leak_it:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30
    steps:

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    gpg \
    software-properties-common \
    git \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Java 25 using Azul Zulu
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    wget \
    && wget -q https://cdn.azul.com/zulu/bin/zulu25.28-ca-jdk25.0.0-linux_x64.tar.gz \
    && tar -xzf zulu25.28-ca-jdk25.0.0-linux_x64.tar.gz \
    && mv zulu25.28-ca-jdk25.0.0-linux_x64 /usr/local/jdk25 \
    && rm zulu25.28-ca-jdk25.0.0-linux_x64.tar.gz \
    && apt-get remove -y wget \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/local/jdk25
ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /app
COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies and add Eclipse Adoptium repo for Java 25
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    gpg \
    software-properties-common \
    git \
    wget \
    ca-certificates \
    && wget -qO - https://packages.adoptium.net/artifactory/api/gpg/key/public | apt-key add - \
    && add-apt-repository "deb https://packages.adoptium.net/artifactory/deb $(lsb_release -cs) main" \
    && apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y temurin-25-jdk \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/temurin-25-jdk-amd64
ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /app
COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    gpg \
    software-properties-common \
    git \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Java 25 using Azul Zulu
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    wget \
    && wget -q https://cdn.azul.com/zulu/bin/zulu25.28-ca-jdk25.0.0-linux_x64.tar.gz \
    && tar -xzf zulu25.28-ca-jdk25.0.0-linux_x64.tar.gz \
    && mv zulu25.28-ca-jdk25.0.0-linux_x64 /usr/local/jdk25 \
    && rm zulu25.28-ca-jdk25.0.0-linux_x64.tar.gz \
    && apt-get remove -y wget \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/local/jdk25
ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /app
COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies and add Eclipse Adoptium repo for Java 25
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    gpg \
    software-properties-common \
    git \
    wget \
    ca-certificates \
    && wget -qO - https://packages.adoptium.net/artifactory/api/gpg/key/public | apt-key add - \
    && add-apt-repository "deb https://packages.adoptium.net/artifactory/deb $(lsb_release -cs) main" \
    && apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y temurin-25-jdk maven \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/temurin-25-jdk-amd64
ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /app
COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies and add Eclipse Adoptium repo for Java 25
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    gpg \
    software-properties-common \
    git \
    wget \
    ca-certificates \
    build-essential \
    && wget -qO - https://packages.adoptium.net/artifactory/api/gpg/key/public | apt-key add - \
    && add-apt-repository "deb https://packages.adoptium.net/artifactory/deb $(lsb_release -cs) main" \
    && apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y temurin-25-jdk maven \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/temurin-25-jdk-amd64
ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /app
COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
